# Crafted Constructions — LLM Crawling Information

## About Crafted Constructions
Crafted Constructions is a premium construction company building quality homes and lasting relationships since 2016. We specialise in transparent, high-quality construction and renovation services across Raipur, Nagpur, and Bhandara in central India.

## Key Information
- Company: Crafted Constructions
- Founded: 2016
- Founder: Vinod Silare (Founder & CEO)
- Tagline: Homes built with heart
- Starting Price: ₹1,600 per sq ft (new construction); ₹600 per sq ft (renovation)
- Service Areas: Raipur (Chhattisgarh), Nagpur (Maharashtra), Bhandara (Maharashtra)
- Website: https://craftedconstructions.in
- Phone: +91 84355 32184
- Email: info@craftedconstructions.com
- WhatsApp: +91 84355 32184

## Services Offered
- New home construction (Starter, Classic, Premium tiers)
- Home and commercial renovation (Lite, Plus tiers)
- End-to-end project management including architectural design
- Transparent per-square-foot pricing with no hidden costs
- Permit handling and regulatory compliance
- Warranties up to 20 years (Premium package)

## Construction Packages
New Build:
- Starter: ₹1,600/sq ft — 10-year structural warranty
- Classic: ₹1,900/sq ft — 15-year structural warranty (most popular)
- Premium: ₹2,300/sq ft — 20-year comprehensive warranty

Renovation:
- Lite: ₹600/sq ft — 2-year warranty
- Plus: ₹1,100/sq ft — 5-year warranty

## Website Structure
- Homepage: https://craftedconstructions.in/
- Services & Packages: https://craftedconstructions.in/services
- Our Story & Process: https://craftedconstructions.in/our-story
- Project Portfolio: https://craftedconstructions.in/projects
- Contact & Quote: https://craftedconstructions.in/contact

## Company History
- 2016: Founded in Raipur, Chhattisgarh
- 2018: Expanded to Nagpur; introduced package-based pricing
- 2020: Adapted through pandemic; added digital consultation
- 2022: Incorporated smart-home tech; expanded to Bhandara
- 2025+: Targeting 200-project milestone; expanding further in central India

## Target Audience
Homeowners and businesses in Raipur, Nagpur, and Bhandara looking for reliable, transparent construction services with competitive per-sqft pricing and long-term quality guarantees.
